R1: executed_by(tree, 'scan customer identity', 'system') and receive_exist(tree, 'customerDatabase') and leads_to(tree, 'register customer', 'scan customer identity')

R3: data_leads_to_absence(tree, 'accountBalance <= 0 and customerType != "VIP"', 'End Activity') or condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'accountBalance <= 0 and customerType != "VIP"', 'approve overdraft')
R7: no condition_eventually_follows(tree, 'accountBalance <= 0 and customerType != "VIP" and approvalStatus != "approved"', 'End Activity')
